title: tragacantha spachiana
intro: Tragacantha spachiana, also known as the lesser thistle or thorny thistle, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, as well as being used as a diuretic. In herbal preparations, Tragacantha spachiana is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
